title: Garlicky, Light Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A flavorful, high-protein-friendly Mexican dish featuring almonds, deglazed with citrus and herbs, served in a light and crispy taco shell.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the sliced almonds to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Deglaze the skillet with the fresh lime juice, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Add the chopped cilantro to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season the chicken with salt and black pepper to taste.
Warm the taco shells according to package instructions.

Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the chicken onto a warmed shell, followed by a spoonful of the almond-cilantro mixture, a sprinkle of shredded cheese, a dollop of sour cream, and a sprinkle of chopped radishes.
